payload.query: What governed automation subtask should Victor actively execute first under the comms-tab prompt automation work? Focus on Build backend prompt-construction pipeline.
groundedNodeLabels: Automate prompt-building inside the comms tab so the user experience collapses to standard chat input/output plus a compact operations display showing prompt construction in real time.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O
Prompt-building logic is automated instead of manually assembled through multiple visible components.
The comms tab primary surface is reduced to normal chat input/output.
